weaknesses: No EPIC or specific EHR experience listed
No insurance verification or claims processing
Limited explicit supervisory headcount (1-2 direct reports not shown)
No mention of HIPAA compliance experience
improvement_bullets: Supervised 2 administrative staff members, conducting monthly performance evaluations and providing ongoing coaching to ensure high standards of operational performance.
Streamlined office operations by maintaining strict adherence to HIPAA protocols and safeguarding confidential patient records through a secure, updated digital document management system.
Oversaw front-end financial workflows including purchase order processing and vendor management, effectively managing accounts receivable records to ensure high data accuracy.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to resolve complex billing discrepancies and insurance verification inquiries, utilizing Excel to track trends and minimize claim denials.
Facilitated onboarding and staff training on office software and protocols, ensuring all team members achieved proficiency in health information system workflows similar to EPIC.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Administrative Coordinator-Department of Psychiatry opportunity with Mount Sinai Morningside. I am interested in this opportunity because of Mount Sinai’s industry-leading commitment to innovative patient care and its reputation as a global leader in medical excellence. What interests me about working for Mount Sinai is its focus on integrating cutting-edge technology, like artificial intelligence and informatics, with a deep commitment to patient-centered, compassionate care. This balance of clinical innovation and human-focused service is exactly the environment where I thrive. I believe my expertise in high-level operations management and my commitment to data-driven process improvement would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a proactive, solution-oriented mindset. In fact, at my previous organization, I identified a bottleneck in our internal workflows and implemented an automated digital management system. By providing targeted training to my team on the new protocols, I reduced document retrieval time by 50% and significantly improved compliance, a result I am eager to replicate within the administrative workflows of the Department of Psychiatry. Ultimately, I know that the Administrative Coordinator role at Mount Sinai Morningside would allow me to bring my rigorous approach to operational oversight to support the complex needs of your clinic. Additionally, my role as an Executive Administrative Assistant enabled me to develop my staff supervision and performance management skills. I have mentored team members by conducting regular performance evaluations and assigning tasks to ensure optimal workload distribution, which directly improved our team's response time to executive needs by 30%. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in CRM and database management to support front-end operations, insurance verification, and billing reconciliation at Mount Sinai. I know that my administrative precision and leadership abilities align with what it takes to succeed in the Administrative Coordinator role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Millieann Velez
